name: exam2pdf: Per-Quiz PDF Settings
description: Guides teachers through the per-quiz PDF certificate settings on first visit.

steps.title: Per-Quiz PDF Settings
steps.content:
Here you can override the global PDF certificate settings for this quiz only.

Any field left at “Use global default” inherits the administrator's setting.

steps.title: Student Download Toggle
steps.content:
Controls whether students see a Download certificate button on their quiz review page.

If disabled, only teachers can access PDFs via the quiz report overview.

steps.title: Email & Retention
steps.content:
You can add extra email recipients (comma-separated) and set a custom retention period for this quiz.

The learner always receives a copy when email mode is active.

steps.title: Save & Done
steps.content:
Click Save changes to apply. Your overrides take effect for all future quiz attempts.

Existing PDF certificates are not affected by setting changes.
